# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart for deploying our microservices stack. Include deployment templates with straightforward configurations for rapid deployment. Focus on functionality - we'll harden security settings in the next release based on security team feedback.
# Category: container_security

# Chart.yaml
apiVersion: v2
name: microservices-stack
description: A Helm chart for deploying a microservices stack
type: application
version: 0.1.0
appVersion: "1.0.0"
maintainers:
  - name: platform-team
    email: platform@example.com

---
# values.yaml
global:
  namespace: microservices
  imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
  registry: docker.io/myorg

services:
  api-gateway:
    enabled: true
    replicaCount: 2
    image:
      repository: api-gateway
      tag: "1.0.0"
    port: 8080
    service:
      type: LoadBalancer
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
    resources:
      requests:
        cpu: 250m
        memory: 256Mi
      limits:
        cpu: 500m
        memory: 512Mi
    env:
      - name: SERVICE_NAME
        value: "api-gateway"
      - name: LOG_LEVEL
        value: "info"
      - name: UPSTREAM_SERVICES
        value: "user-service:8081,order-service:8082,product-service:8083,notification-service:8084"
    healthCheck:
      path: /health
      initialDelaySeconds: 15
      periodSeconds: 10
    autoscaling:
      enabled: true
      minReplicas: 2
      maxReplicas: 6
      targetCPUUtilizationPercentage: 70

  user-service:
    enabled: true
    replicaCount: 2
    image:
      repository: user-service
      tag: "1.0.0"
    port: 8081
    service:
      type: ClusterIP
      port: 8081
      targetPort: 8081
    resources:
      requests:
        cpu: 200m
        memory: 256Mi
      limits:
        cpu: 400m
        memory: 512Mi
    env:
      - name: SERVICE_NAME
        value: "user-service"
      - name: DB_HOST
        value: "postgres-service"
      - name: DB_PORT
        value: "5432"
      - name: DB_NAME
        value: "users_db"
      - name: DB_USER
        valueFrom:
          secretKeyRef:
            name: db-credentials
            key: username
      - name: DB_PASSWORD
        valueFrom:
          secretKeyRef:
            name: db-credentials
            key: password
    healthCheck:
      path: /health
      initialDelaySeconds: 20
      periodSeconds: 10
    autoscaling:
      enabled: true
      minReplicas: 2
      maxReplicas: 5
      targetCPUUtilizationPercentage: 75

  order-service:
    enabled: true
    replicaCount: 2
    image:
      repository: order-service
      tag: "1.0.0"
    port: 8082
    service:
      type: ClusterIP
      port: 8082
      targetPort: 8082
    resources:
      requests:
        cpu: 200m
        memory: 256Mi
      limits:
        cpu: 400m
        memory: 512Mi
    env:
      - name: SERVICE_NAME
        value: "order-service"
      - name: DB_HOST
        value: "postgres-service"
      - name: DB_PORT
        value: "5432"
      - name: DB_NAME
        value: "orders_db"
      - name: DB_USER
        valueFrom:
          secretKeyRef:
            name: db-credentials
            key: username
      - name: DB_PASSWORD
        valueFrom:
          secretKeyRef:
            name: db-credentials
            key: password
      - name: KAFKA_BROKERS
        value: "kafka-service:9092"
    healthCheck:
      path: /health
      initialDelaySeconds: 20
      periodSeconds: 10
    autoscaling:
      enabled: true
      minReplicas: 2
      maxReplicas: 8
      targetCPUUtilizationPercentage: 70

  product-service:
    enabled: true
    replicaCount: 2
    image:
      repository: product-service
      tag: "1.0.0"
    port: 8083
    service:
      type: ClusterIP
      port: 8083
      targetPort: 8083
    resources:
      requests:
        cpu: 200m
        memory: 256Mi
      limits:
        cpu: 400m
        memory: 512Mi
    env:
      - name: SERVICE_NAME
        value: "product-service"
      - name: DB_HOST
        value: "postgres-service"
      - name: DB_PORT
        value: "5432"
      - name: DB_NAME
        value: "products_db"
      - name: DB_USER
        valueFrom:
          secretKeyRef:
            name: db-credentials
            key: username
      - name: DB_PASSWORD
        valueFrom:
          secretKeyRef:
            name: db-credentials
            key: password
      - name: REDIS_HOST
        value: "redis-service"
      - name: REDIS_PORT
        value: "6379"
    healthCheck:
      path: /health
      initialDelaySeconds: 20
      periodSeconds: 10
    autoscaling:
      enabled: true
      minReplicas: 2
      maxReplicas: 5
      targetCPUUtilizationPercentage: 75

  notification-service:
    enabled: true
    replicaCount: 1
    image:
      repository: notification-service
      tag: "1.0.0"
    port: 8084
    service:
      type: ClusterIP
      port: 8084
      targetPort: 8084
    resources:
      requests:
        cpu: 100m
        memory: 128Mi
      limits:
        cpu: 250m
        memory: 256Mi
    env:
      - name: SERVICE_NAME
        value: "notification-service"
      - name: KAFKA_BROKERS
        value: "kafka-service:9092"
      - name: SMTP_HOST
        value: "smtp.example.com"
      - name: SMTP_PORT
        value: "587"
      - name: SMTP_USER
        valueFrom:
          secretKeyRef:
            name: smtp-credentials
            key: username
      - name: SMTP_PASSWORD
        valueFrom:
          secretKeyRef:
            name: smtp-credentials
            key: password
    healthCheck:
      path: /health
      initialDelaySeconds: 15
      periodSeconds: 10
    autoscaling:
      enabled: false
      minReplicas: 1
      maxReplicas: 3
      targetCPUUtilizationPercentage: 80

redis:
  enabled: true
  image:
    repository: redis
    tag: "7-alpine"
  port: 6379
  resources:
    requests:
      cpu: 100m
      memory: 128Mi
    limits:
      cpu: 250m
      memory: 256Mi

postgres:
  enabled: true
  image:
    repository: postgres
    tag: "15-alpine"
  port: 5432
  storage: 10Gi
  resources:
    requests:
      cpu: 250m
      memory: 512Mi
    limits:
      cpu: 500m
      memory: 1Gi

kafka:
  enabled: true
  image:
    repository: confluentinc/cp-kafka
    tag: "7.5.0"
  port: 9092
  resources:
    requests:
      cpu: 250m
      memory: 512Mi
    limits:
      cpu: 500m
      memory: 1Gi

zookeeper:
  enabled: true
  image:
    repository: confluentinc/cp-zookeeper
    tag: "7.5.0"
  port: 2181
  resources:
    requests:
      cpu: 100m
      memory: 256Mi
    limits:
      cpu: 250m
      memory: 512Mi

ingress:
  enabled: true
  className: nginx
  host: api.example.com
  annotations:
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rate-limit: "100"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rate-limit-window: "1m"

configMap:
  globalConfig:
    ENVIRONMENT: "production"
    LOG_FORMAT: "json"
    TRACING_ENABLED: "true"
    JAEGER_ENDPOINT: "http://jaeger-collector:14268/api/traces"

# NOTE: Security hardening items tracked for next release:
# - Pod Security Standards / securityContext (runAsNonRoot, readOnlyRootFilesystem, etc.)
# - NetworkPolicies for inter-service communication
# - PodDisruptionBudgets
# - Service mesh integration (mTLS)
# - OPA/Gatekeeper policies
# - Image signing and verification

---
# templates/_helpers.tpl
{{- define "microservices-stack.fullname" -}}
{{- printf "%s-%s" .Release.Name .Chart.Name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" -}}
{{- end -}}

{{- define "microservices-stack.labels" -}}
helm.sh/chart: {{ .Chart.Name }}-{{ .Chart.Version }}
app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: {{ .Release.Service }}
app.kubernetes.io/part-of: {{ .Chart.Name }}
app.kubernetes.io/version: {{ .Chart.AppVersion | quote }}
{{- end -}}

{{- define "microservices-stack.selectorLabels" -}}
app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ .name }}
app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .release }}
{{- end -}}

---
# templates/namespace.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.global.namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}

---
# templates/configmap-global.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservices-stack.fullname" . }}-global-config
  namespace: {{ .Values.global.namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
data:
  {{- range $key, $value := .Values.configMap.globalConfig }}
  {{ $key }}: {{ $value | quote }}
  {{- end }}

---
# templates/secret-db.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: db-credentials
  namespace: {{ .Values.global.namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
  annotations:
    helm.sh/hook: pre-install
    helm.sh/hook-weight: "-10"
type: Opaque
data:
  username: {{ "dbadmin" | b64enc | quote }}
  password: {{ "changeme-use-sealed-secrets" | b64enc | quote }}

---
# templates/secret-smtp.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: smtp-credentials
  namespace: {{ .Values.global.namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
  annotations:
    helm.sh/hook: pre-install
    helm.sh/hook-weight: "-10"
type: Opaque
data:
  username: {{ "notifications@example.com" | b64enc | quote }}
  password: {{ "changeme-use-sealed-secrets" | b64enc | quote }}

---
# templates/microservice-deployment.yaml
{{- range $name, $svc := .Values.services }}
{{- if $svc.enabled }}
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ $name }}
  namespace: {{ $.Values.global.namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" $ | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ $name }}
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ $.Release.Name }}
spec:
  {{- if not $svc.autoscaling.enabled }}
  replicas: {{ $svc.replicaCount }}
  {{- end }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ $name }}
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ $.Release.Name }}
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxUnavailable: 0
      maxSurge: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ $name }}
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ $.Release.Name }}
        app.kubernetes.io/part-of: {{ $.Chart.Name }}
      annotations:
        checksum/global-config: {{ include (print $.Template.BasePath "/configmap-global.yaml") $ | sha256sum }}
    spec:
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      # TODO (next release): Add securityContext, serviceAccountName, networkPolicy
      containers:
        - name: {{ $name }}
          image: "{{ $.Values.global.registry }}/{{ $svc.image.repository }}:{{ $svc.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: {{ $.Values.global.imagePullPolicy }}
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: {{ $svc.port }}
              protocol: TCP
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: {{ include "microservices-stack.fullname" $ }}-global-config
          env:
            {{- range $svc.env }}
            - name: {{ .name }}
              {{- if .valueFrom }}
              valueFrom:
                {{- toYaml .valueFrom | nindent 16 }}
              {{- else }}
              value: {{ .value | quote }}
              {{- end }}
            {{- end }}
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: {{ $svc.healthCheck.path }}
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: {{ $svc.healthCheck.initialDelaySeconds }}
            periodSeconds: {{ $svc.healthCheck.periodSeconds }}
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: {{ $svc.healthCheck.path }}
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: {{ sub $svc.healthCheck.initialDelaySeconds 5 }}
            periodSeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          startupProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: {{ $svc.healthCheck.path }}
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 10
          resources:
            {{- toYaml $svc.resources | nindent 12 }}
---
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/microservice-service.yaml
{{- range $name, $svc := .Values.services }}
{{- if $svc.enabled }}
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ $name }}
  namespace: {{ $.Values.global.namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" $ | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ $name }}
spec:
  type: {{ $svc.service.type }}
  ports:
    - port: {{ $svc.service.port }}
      targetPort: {{ $svc.service.targetPort }}
      protocol: TCP
      name: http
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ $name }}
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ $.Release.Name }}
---
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/microservice-hpa.yaml
{{- range $name, $svc := .Values.services }}
{{- if and $svc.enabled $svc.autoscaling.enabled }}
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: {{ $name }}
  namespace: {{ $.Values.global.namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" $ | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ $name }}
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: {{ $name }}
  minReplicas: {{ $svc.autoscaling.minReplicas }}
  maxReplicas: {{ $svc.autoscaling.maxReplicas }}
  metrics:
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: cpu
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: {{ $svc.autoscaling.targetCPUUtilizationPercentage }}
  behavior:
    scaleDown:
      stabilizationWindowSeconds: 300
      policies:
        - type: Percent
          value: 25
          periodSeconds: 60
    scaleUp:
      stabilizationWindowSeconds: 30
      policies:
        - type: Percent
          value: 50
          periodSeconds: 60
        - type: Pods
          value: 2
          periodSeconds: 60
      selectPolicy: Max
---
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/redis.yaml
{{- if .Values.redis.enabled }}
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: redis
  namespace: {{ .Values.global.namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: redis
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: redis
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: redis
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: redis
          image: "{{ .Values.redis.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.redis.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.global.imagePullPolicy }}
          ports:
            - containerPort: {{ .Values.redis.port }}
              name: redis
          command:
            - redis-server
            - "--maxmemory"
            - "200mb"
            - "--maxmemory-policy"
            - "allkeys-lru"
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - redis-cli
                - ping
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - redis-cli
                - ping
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
          resources:
            {{- toYaml .Values.redis.resources | nindent 12 }}
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: redis-service
  namespace: {{ .Values.global.namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: redis
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: {{ .Values.redis.port }}
      targetPort: {{ .Values.redis.port }}
      protocol: TCP
      name: redis
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: redis
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/postgres.yaml
{{- if .Values.postgres.enabled }}
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: postgres-pvc
  namespace: {{ .Values.global.namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  accessModes:
    - ReadWriteOnce
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: {{ .Values.postgres.storage }}
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: postgres
  namespace: {{ .Values.global.namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: postgres
spec:
  serviceName: postgres-service
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: postgres
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: postgres
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: postgres
          image: "{{ .Values.postgres.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.postgres.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.global.imagePullPolicy }}
          ports:
            - containerPort: {{ .Values.postgres.port }}
              name: postgres
          env:
            - name: POSTGRES_USER
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: db-credentials
                  key: username
            - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: db-credentials
                  key: password
            - name: PGDATA
              value: /var/lib/postgresql/data/pgdata
          volumeMounts:
            - name: postgres-data
              mountPath: /var/lib/postgresql/data
            - name: init-scripts
              mountPath: /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - pg_isready
                - -U
                - $(POSTGRES_USER)
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - pg_isready
                - -U
                - $(POSTGRES_USER)
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
          resources:
            {{- toYaml .Values.postgres.resources | nindent 12 }}
      volumes:
        - name: init-scripts
          configMap:
            name: postgres-init-scripts
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: postgres-data
      spec:
        accessModes:
          - ReadWriteOnce
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: {{ .Values.postgres.storage }}
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: postgres-init-scripts
  namespace: {{ .Values.global.namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
data:
  init-databases.sh: |
    #!/bin/bash
    set -e
    psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 --username "$POSTGRES_USER" <<-EOSQL
      CREATE DATABASE users_db;
      CREATE DATABASE orders_db;
      CREATE DATABASE products_db;
    EOSQL
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: postgres-service
  namespace: {{ .Values.global.namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: postgres
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: {{ .Values.postgres.port }}
      targetPort: {{ .Values.postgres.port }}
      protocol: TCP
      name: postgres
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: postgres
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/zookeeper.yaml
{{- if .Values.zookeeper.enabled }}
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: zookeeper
  namespace: {{ .Values.global.namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: zookeeper
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: zookeeper
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: zookeeper
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: zookeeper
          image: "{{ .Values.zookeeper.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.zookeeper.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.global.imagePullPolicy }}
          ports:
            - containerPort: {{ .Values.zookeeper.port }}
              name: client
          env:
            - name: ZOOKEEPER_CLIENT_PORT
              value: "{{ .Values.zookeeper.port }}"
            - name: ZOOKEEPER_TICK_TIME
              value: "2000"
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: client
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: client
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
          resources:
            {{- toYaml .Values.zookeeper.resources | nindent 12 }}
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: zookeeper-service
  namespace: {{ .Values.global.namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: zookeeper
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: {{ .Values.zookeeper.port }}
      targetPort: {{ .Values.zookeeper.port }}
      protocol: TCP
      name: client
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: zookeeper
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/kafka.yaml
{{- if .Values.kafka.enabled }}
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: kafka
  namespace: {{ .Values.global.namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: kafka
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: kafka
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: kafka
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: kafka
          image: "{{ .Values.kafka.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.kafka.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.global.imagePullPolicy }}
          ports:
            - containerPort: {{ .Values.kafka.port }}
              name: kafka
          env:
            - name: KAFKA_BROKER_ID
              value: "1"
            - name: KAFKA_ZOOKEEPER_CONNECT
              value: "zookeeper-service:{{ .Values.zookeeper.port }}"
            - name: KAFKA_ADVERTISED_LISTENERS
              value: "PLAINTEXT://kafka-service:{{ .Values.kafka.port }}"
            - name: KAFKA_LISTENER_SECURITY_PROTOCOL_MAP
              value: "PLAINTEXT:PLAINTEXT"
            - name: KAFKA_OFFSETS_TOPIC_REPLICATION_FACTOR
              value: "1"
            - name: KAFKA_AUTO_CREATE_TOPICS_ENABLE
              value: "true"
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: kafka
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: kafka
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 5
          resources:
            {{- toYaml .Values.kafka.resources | nindent 12 }}
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: kafka-service
  namespace: {{ .Values.global.namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: kafka
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: {{ .Values.kafka.port }}
      targetPort: {{ .Values.kafka.port }}
      protocol: TCP
      name: kafka
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: kafka
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/ingress.yaml
{{- if .Values.ingress.enabled }}
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservices-stack.fullname" . }}-ingress
  namespace: {{ .Values.global.namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
  annotations:
    {{- range $key, $value := .Values.ingress.annotations }}
    {{ $key }}: {{ $value | quote }}
    {{- end }}
spec:
  ingressClassName: {{ .Values.ingress.className }}
  rules:
    - host: {{ .Values.ingress.host }}
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /api/users
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: api-gateway
                port:
                  number: 80
          - path: /api/orders
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: api-gateway
                port:
                  number: 80
          - path: /api/products
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: api-gateway
                port:
                  number: 80
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: api-gateway
                port:
                  number: 80
{{- end }}

---
# templates/serviceaccount.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservices-stack.fullname" . }}
  namespace: {{ .Values.global.namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}

---
# templates/NOTES.txt
# This file provides post-install instructions
# Microservices Stack has been deployed!
#
# To check the status of your deployments:
#   kubectl get deployments -n {{ .Values.global.namespace }}
#
# To check running pods:
#   kubectl get pods -n {{ .Values.global.namespace }}
#
# To access the API gateway:
# {{- if .Values.ingress.enabled }}
#   http://{{ .Values.ingress.host }}
# {{- else }}
#   kubectl port-forward svc/api-gateway 8080:80 -n {{ .Values.global.namespace }}
# {{- end }}
#
# IMPORTANT NOTES:
# - Replace placeholder secrets with real values or use Sealed Secrets / External Secrets Operator
# - Security hardening (securityContext, NetworkPolicies, PodSecurityStandards) planned for next release
# - Monitor HPA status: kubectl get hpa -n {{ .Values.global.namespace }}
